title: Create GoNear job exchange platform with user profiles, matching, swap requests, messaging, and admin panel

requirements.text: Implement user authentication with Internet Identity integration allowing users to sign up and log in securely
acceptanceCriteria: Users can sign up using Internet Identity
Users can log in using Internet Identity
Authentication state persists across sessions
Unauthenticated users are redirected to login

requirements.text: Create user profile data model in backend with fields: name, company name, job role, current city, preferred city, salary range, and experience level

quotes: Create a profile with: Name, Company Name, Job Role, Current City, Preferred City, Salary Range, Experience

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores user profile with all required fields
Profile data is associated with user's principal ID
Salary range is stored as a structured data type
All fields are required for profile creation

requirements.text: Build profile creation and editing UI form with input fields for name, company name, job role, current city, preferred city, salary range, and experience

quotes: Create a profile with: Name, Company Name, Job Role, Current City, Preferred City, Salary Range, Experience

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all required profile fields
Form validates required fields before submission
Users can edit their existing profile
Success and error messages display appropriately
Form is mobile-friendly

requirements.text: Implement matching algorithm in backend that finds users who want to swap jobs where current user's preferred city matches other user's current city, and both share the same company name and job role

quotes: See matching users who want to swap jobs in the same company and role

acceptanceCriteria: Matching logic compares current city with preferred city bidirectionally
Matches only occur when company name and job role are identical
Backend returns list of matching user profiles
Current user is excluded from their own match results

requirements.text: Create matches listing UI that displays all matching users with their profile details in a clean, scannable format

quotes: See matching users who want to swap jobs in the same company and role

acceptanceCriteria: Matches are displayed with key profile information
UI clearly shows why users match (shared company, role, city swap)
Empty state shows when no matches exist
List is responsive and mobile-friendly

requirements.text: Implement swap request system in backend allowing users to send, accept, and reject swap requests with status tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send swap requests to matched users
Swap requests track sender, recipient, and status (pending, accepted, rejected)
Users can accept or reject incoming swap requests
Prevent duplicate requests between same users
Status updates persist in backend

requirements.text: Build swap request UI with send request button on match profiles, and inbox showing incoming requests with accept/reject actions
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send swap request from match profile view
Incoming swap requests display in dedicated inbox
Accept and reject buttons are clearly visible
Request status updates in real-time after action
UI prevents sending duplicate requests

requirements.text: Implement in-app messaging system in backend allowing matched users to send and receive text messages with message history storage
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores messages between user pairs
Messages include sender, recipient, text content, and timestamp
Users can only message matched users
Message history is retrievable per conversation
Messages persist across sessions

requirements.text: Create messaging UI with conversation list, message thread view, and text input for sending messages between matched users
acceptanceCriteria: Conversation list shows all message threads
Message thread displays full conversation history
Text input allows sending new messages
Messages display with sender identification and timestamp
UI is mobile-friendly with smooth scrolling
New messages appear immediately after sending

requirements.text: Implement admin role and permissions in backend with ability to view all users, verify profiles, approve users, and block users

quotes: Admin can: View all users, Verify profiles, Approve or block users

acceptanceCriteria: Backend maintains admin role assignments
Admin functions are protected and only accessible to admin users
Backend tracks user verification status
Backend tracks user approval/blocked status
Admin can retrieve list of all users with their statuses

requirements.text: Build admin dashboard UI displaying all users in a table with actions to verify profiles, approve users, and block users

quotes: Admin can: View all users, Verify profiles, Approve or block users

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard is only accessible to admin users
User table displays key profile information and status
Verify, approve, and block actions are clearly available
Status changes reflect immediately in the UI
Dashboard is mobile-friendly

requirements.text: Apply a simple, clean, mobile-friendly design system using blue as the primary color with consistent typography, spacing, and component styling throughout the application

quotes: Design should be simple, clean, and mobile-friendly. Primary color: Blue

acceptanceCriteria: Blue is used as the primary brand color for buttons, links, and key UI elements
Design is responsive and works well on mobile devices
Typography is clear and readable
Layout is clean with adequate whitespace
UI components follow consistent styling patterns

constraints: Use Internet Identity for authentication (no third-party auth providers)
All data must be stored in Motoko backend (no external databases)
Blue must be the primary color in the design system
nonGoals: Email notifications for swap requests or messages
